description: Research Solutions provides tools for discovering, accessing, licensing, and organizing scholarly literature, including the Article Galaxy and Scite products. Its offerings support researchers and institutions with article access, citation intelligence, and AI-assisted research workflows.
summary: Research Solutions publicly documents two MCP servers—Article Galaxy MCP and Scite MCP—both requiring paid product accounts; it mentions Scite API and Article Galaxy API exist, but does not publish developer-facing endpoints, specs, or auth mechanics for them on researchsolutions.com.
